title: January 29
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}

'''January 29''' is the 29th day of the year. There are 336 days remaining (337 in leap years). There are a total of 365 days in a year (366 in a leap year)</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1942|1942]] – [[Peter Sumner]] is born.
*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Matthew Stover]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Brian Wood]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Ryan Kelly]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Anna Acton]] is born.
*[[2002]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]'' novel published.
*2002 – ''[[The Approaching Storm]]'' novel published.
*[[2003]] – [[Star Wars: Jango Fett: Open Seasons (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: Jango Fett: Open Seasons'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2004]] – ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 4]]'' published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Cold Snap]]'' published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2010]] – "[[The Mandalore Plot]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2013]] – [[Star Wars Insider 139|''Star Wars Insider'' 139]] published.
*2013 – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Apocalypse]]'' paperback released.
*[[2014]] – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File Part 4 (2014)|''The Official Star Wars Fact File Part 4'']] published.
*[[2020]] – [[Star Wars (2020) 2|''Star Wars'' (2020) 2]] published.
*2020 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 30|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 30]] published.
*[[2021]] – The [[Star Wars: Battlefront (Original Video Game Soundtrack)|soundtrack]] for ''[[Star Wars Battlefront]]'' released.
*[[2025]] – [[A New Legacy 1|''A New Legacy'' 1]]  published.
*2025 – [[Ewoks (2024) 4|''Ewoks'' (2024) 4]] published.
*2025 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2023) 14|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2023) 14]] published.
*2025 – [[The High Republic Adventures – Dispatches from the Occlusion Zone 4|''The High Republic Adventures – Dispatches from the Occlusion Zone'' 4]] published.
*2025 – [[The High Republic Adventures – Echoes of Fear 4|''The High Republic Adventures – Echoes of Fear'' 4]] published.
*2025 – ''[[The High Republic Adventures Phase III Annual]]'' published.
